podcasts.name: Davie Fogarty
podcasts.title: The sales advice beginners need
podcasts.transcript: What's your name and what do you do? >> Uh Pav and DY. I'm VP of partnerships with the Daily Mentor. >> What's your main profession? >> I'm a sales professional. Been doing sales for about 20 years now. >> What's your main sales tip? >> Uh main sales tip is be yourself, right? Be authentic. Because when you try to be like someone else, it's not going to ever come out right. >> What's the most amount that someone could expect to earn from doing sales in their first year, fifth year, and 10th year? >> I've trained people that uh can do sales and they're making $20,000 a month. Dude, like the sky's is the limit, man. You could make a million dollars a month if you really wanted to, right? Just depends how hard you grind and how bad you want it. >> What's the main difference between the people that succeed in sales versus fail in sales? >> It's got to be your identity. You got to be obsessed, man. If you're not obsessed with it, it's it's just a regular 9 to5. How do you learn sales? >> Learn for someone else. Someone that's better than you. >> How do you do that? How do you find someone? >> Find a mentor, right? Look online, network, talk to as many people as possible, and eventually you're going to find the right one. You'll grow from there. >> If someone wanted to get into sales, how would they do it? >> You could do door-to-do door sales. You could become an appointment setter. Start off and be humble, right? uh learn from other people and understand that uh you know there's always going to be opportunity. So even if you start from the bottom, as long as you continue to learn and and craft, you will grow. How do you deal with a fear of rejection? >> Just talk to as many people as possible. I I've been in industries where I talked to 100 people in a day and if I got one sale, that's a W. That's part of life, right? Uh so uh can't be scared of rejection.
